title: Seeing Around Corners
author: Rita McGrath
subline: Inflection points hide at the edges.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <g transform="translate(180 1100)" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
    <g opacity="0.6">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="170" y="0" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="340" y="0" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="510" y="0" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="680" y="0" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="850" y="0" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="0" y="170" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="170" y="170" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="340" y="170" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="510" y="170" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="680" y="170" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="850" y="170" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="0" y="340" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="170" y="340" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="340" y="340" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="510" y="340" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="680" y="340" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="850" y="340" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="0" y="510" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="170" y="510" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="340" y="510" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="510" y="510" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="680" y="510" width="160" height="160"/>
      <rect x="850" y="510" width="160" height="160"/>
    </g>
    <line x1="0" y1="850" x2="1010" y2="850" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1"/>
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.2em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="80" y="900">HYPE</text>
      <text x="332" y="900">DISMISSIVE</text>
      <text x="584" y="900">EMERGENT</text>
      <text x="836" y="900">MATURITY</text>
    </g>
    <rect x="1010" y="510" width="160" height="160" fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M 950 670 Q 1050 700 1100 600" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <polyline points="1080,608 1100,590 1118,612" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="1180" y="610" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">INFLECTION</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 6x3 grid of graphite squares fills the lower 2/3; one solid red square sits outside the grid — the inflection point that has 'rounded the corner.' A small red curve connects them. Below the grid, four labels mark the stages (Hype, Dismissive, Emergent, Maturity). Title sits top in mixed case. The metaphor is exact: a stable field disrupted by a single off-grid red square you have to see coming.
